company_type: Agricultural Supply Chain Management and Processing

dependencies: Dependence on thousands of growers in productive agricultural regions globally
Reliance on agricultural commodities subject to weather, crop disease, government policies
Transportation infrastructure including rivers, waterways, rail, barge, ocean vessels
Energy supply (electricity, natural gas, coal) for processing plants
risks: Agricultural commodity price volatility and availability fluctuations
Weather conditions and crop disease impacts on raw material supply
Energy price fluctuations and supply disruptions
Deforestation risks in South American soy and global palm supply chains
Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical conflicts (Russia-Ukraine war)
Maritime piracy risks in shipping routes
Supplier insolvency or inability to perform
Border closures and trade flow disruptions

regulatory_risks: EU Network and Information Security (NIS2) directive cybersecurity requirements
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) reporting requirements starting 2026
EU Deforestation Regulation affecting soybean and palm oil imports
OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax (15%) implementation
U.S. tax law changes and international tax compliance
Renewable Fuel Standard and biofuel policy changes (Clean Fuels Production Tax Credit)
Environmental regulations including GHG emissions and carbon pricing programs
Food safety and product labeling regulations
Data privacy and security regulations (GDPR and similar)
State and local environmental, health, and safety regulations
Agricultural subsidy and government program changes

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions exposure from ongoing Russia-Ukraine war
Risk of trading with sanctioned partners due to volume of sanctions against Russia
Potential asset expropriation in conflict regions
